verses.1: LORD, God of vengeance, God of vengeance, shine forth!
verses.2: Rise up, Judge of the earth, Pay back retribution to the proud.
verses.3: How long, LORD, shall the wicked— How long shall the wicked triumph?
verses.4: They pour out words, they speak arrogantly; All who do injustice boast.
verses.5: They crush Your people, LORD, And afflict Your inheritance.
verses.6: They kill the widow and the stranger And murder the orphans.
verses.7: They have said, “The LORD does not see, Nor does the God of Jacob perceive.”
verses.8: Pay attention, you stupid ones among the people; And when will you understand, foolish ones?
verses.9: He who planted the ear, does He not hear? Or He who formed the eye, does He not see?
verses.10: He who disciplines the nations, will He not rebuke, He who teaches mankind knowledge?
verses.11: The LORD knows human thoughts, That they are mere breath.
verses.12: Blessed is the man whom You discipline, LORD, And whom You teach from Your Law,
verses.13: So that You may grant him relief from the days of adversity, Until a pit is dug for the wicked.
verses.14: For the LORD will not abandon His people, Nor will He abandon His inheritance.
verses.15: For judgment will again be righteous, And all the upright in heart will follow it.
verses.16: Who will stand up for me against evildoers? Who will take his stand for me against those who do injustice?
verses.17: If the LORD had not been my help, My soul would soon have dwelt in the land of silence.
verses.18: If I should say, “My foot has slipped,” Your faithfulness, LORD, will support me.
verses.19: When my anxious thoughts multiply within me, Your comfort delights my soul.
verses.20: Can a throne of destruction be allied with You, One which devises mischief by decree?
verses.21: They band themselves together against the life of the righteous And condemn the innocent to death.
verses.22: But the LORD has been my refuge, And my God the rock of my refuge.
verses.23: He has brought back their injustice upon them, And He will destroy them in their evil; The LORD our God will destroy them.
